tagline: Plumbing, heating & AC in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Lysell Plumbing & Heating — a local Santa Rosa contractor handling plumbing, heating, furnace, and air-conditioning service for homes and businesses.
heroHeading: Plumbing, heating and AC service in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: A local Santa Rosa contractor handling plumbing, heating, furnace, and air-conditioning repair for homes and businesses.
aboutBody: Lysell Plumbing & Heating is a Santa Rosa contractor serving the local community with plumbing and heating services for homes and businesses.

The company handles plumbing repairs, heating-equipment service, furnace repair and cleaning, and air-conditioning work across the Santa Rosa area. Give them a call to ask about availability, scheduling, or a quote.

services.title: Plumbing
services.description: Repair and service for residential and commercial plumbing systems.

services.title: Heating Repair
services.description: Repair and maintenance of heating equipment and systems.

services.title: Furnace Repair & Cleaning
services.description: Furnace repair and cleaning to keep your system running through the colder months.

services.title: Air Conditioning
services.description: Air-conditioning service for homes and businesses in the Santa Rosa area.

notes: VERY sparse online — no website, no reviews/rating, no photos. Services + hours from directory listings. Owner possibly Bill/William Lysell (unconfirmed). Confirm the business is active + the CSLB license before sending. 1809 Sansone Dr, (707) 576-1334.
